action.description:
Introduced by Senators Ratcliff, L. Johnson, Wall, Spreitzer, Drake, Dassler-Alfheim, Habush Sinykin, Hesselbein, Keyeski, Larson, Pfaff, Roys and Wirch; 
cosponsored by Representatives Joers, Anderson, Arney, Bare, Billings, Brown, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Goodwin, Johnson, Mayadev, McCarville, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Palmeri, Rivera-Wagner, Roe, Sinicki, Sheehan, Snodgrass, Spaude, Stroud, Stubbs, Subeck, Taylor, Udell, Prado, Hysell and Tenorio
